name: manifest
description: Package manifest tools — managing project dependencies and metadata (npm, cargo, pip, composer)

subcommands.name: init
subcommands.description: Initialize a new package manifest file

subcommands.name: install
subcommands.description: Install all dependencies from manifest file

subcommands.name: add
subcommands.description: Add a dependency to the manifest

subcommands.name: remove
subcommands.description: Remove a dependency from the manifest

subcommands.name: update
subcommands.description: Update dependencies to latest compatible versions

subcommands.name: audit
subcommands.description: Check dependencies for known security vulnerabilities

globalOptions.name: --dry-run
globalOptions.description: Show what would be done without executing

examples: cargo init && cargo add serde --features derive
